author: bfonta
body:
This PR includes a series of improvements on `dqm-plot`:
+ add `index.php` to parent folder relative to the directory passed with the `-o` option
+ set the default number of processors to 4 (currently the framework uses all available processors)
+ fix the description of the `--sources` argument
+ add option to configure the title of the legend
+ add option for rebinning, by passing a single integer
+ use the full DQM histogram name as the name used to save the figures; currently the name is related to the regex match, which can create some confusion
+ add the `--require-full-sources` user option, which assumes the sources contain the full directory structure of the DQM files, in order to only traverse the directories containing the histograms to be plotted, providing a potentially significant throughput; with two DQM files, selecting 4  histograms, I got:

    + without `--require-full-sources`: 34.3s
    + with `--require-full-sources`: 2.8s

@Parsifal-2045 @elenavernazza
title: dqm-plot improvements
